name: Review Uncommitted Changes
when_to_use: Another agent changed files and the user wants Codex to review staged, unstaged, and untracked work

name: Review Branch Diff
when_to_use: The user wants Codex to review branch changes against a base branch

name: Review Commit
when_to_use: The user wants Codex to review a specific commit

name: Second Opinion
when_to_use: The user wants Codex to analyze a technical decision, bug, plan, architecture, or repo question

name: Cross-Project Reflection
when_to_use: A reflection workflow wants Codex to identify recurring mistakes, user feedback patterns, and improvements across projects rather than reviewing the current repo

name: Prepare Prompt Only
when_to_use: The user wants a safe Codex prompt or command without invoking the CLI yet

name: Diagnose Codex Setup
when_to_use: Codex auth, config, sandbox, or runtime health is unclear
